title: The Devil Is Driving
writer: Frank Mitchell Dazey, P.J. Wolfson, Allen Rivkin
actors: Edmund Lowe, Wynne Gibson, James Gleason
plot: There is a garage in downtown New York City on the ground floor of an eight-story building, with a winding ramp, that serves as a cache for stolen automobiles. The second floor is the repair shop, with the third, fourth and fifth ...
